title: ASK Processing Log
description: Record of a single process-document run: the document handled, schema changes made, YAML produced, and the validation outcome.

inbox.description: Repo-relative path of the source document in inbox/.

markdown.description: Repo-relative path of its Markdown rendering.

types.description: Data types extracted from the document.

schema_changes.description: Changes made to data-type schemas this run (may be empty).

type.description: The data type whose schema changed.

path.description: Repo-relative path of the schema file.

yaml_written.description: Repo-relative paths of the YAML files written this run.

migrations.description: Bulk migrations performed (e.g. temp/ scripts run).

validation.description: Outcome of validating the affected types.

types_validated.description: Types passed to validate.py this run.

details.description: Validator output or notes about failures and fixes.

notes.description: Free-form notes about anything notable in this run.
